name: hospital-app
description: Hospital bill generation app - runs both backend and frontend

scripts.install:all: cd nodeApp && npm install && cd ../reactApp && npm install
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run start:backend" "cd reactApp && cross-env BROWSER=none react-scripts start" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cd reactApp && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build:frontend && cd reactApp && electron-builder
